events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer valid JSON only, no prose. Task: tool/material selection for Terminations & splices industrial site. Scenario says selected tool/material package matches size, rating, application shown on referenced sheet. Staged parts clean, intact, sized. Reference material NEC 110.14. Need evaluate and return decision. Since work staged, no defects, matches specs. Decision pass. Risk low. Work_stage staged. Component_conditions none => empty list. Percent_complete 0 maybe as not begun. Value 0. Sound_source? empty string maybe. Confidence 1.0. Event_time 0. Rate 0. Order empty. Workable empty. Findings empty. Actions empty. Rationale: tool/material package properly matched per drawings/specs and NEC 110.14. References NEC 110.14. Need ensure raw JSON.
